description: Anaconda Navigator is open on the Environments tab showing the base environment. Click the 'Create' button to create a new conda environment named 'ml_project' with Python 3.11. Then switch to the 'ml_project' environment and install the following packages via Navigator's package manager: numpy, pandas, scikit-learn, and matplotlib. After installing all packages, confirm the packages are visible in the installed list for 'ml_project'. All actions must be performed through the Navigator GUI, not the terminal.
